formal_statement: theorem leapfrogInvariant_preserved (omega dt x xPrev : ℝ) (hdt : dt ≠ 0) : leapfrogInvariant omega dt (leapfrogStep omega dt x xPrev) x = leapfrogInvariant omega dt x xPrev
target: A proof using unfold, field_simp [hdt], and ring.

formal_statement: theorem leapfrogInvariant_step_of_isLeapfrogOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (hdt : dt ≠ 0) (x : ℕ → ℝ) (hx : IsLeapfrogOrbit omega dt x) (n : ℕ) : leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x (n + 2)) (x (n + 1)) = leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x (n + 1)) (x n)
target: A proof rewriting with hx n and applying leapfrogInvariant_preserved.

formal_statement: theorem leapfrogInvariant_const_of_isLeapfrogOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (hdt : dt ≠ 0) (x : ℕ → ℝ) (hx : IsLeapfrogOrbit omega dt x) : ∀ n : ℕ, leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x (n + 1)) (x n) = leapfrogInvariant omega dt (x 1) (x 0)
target: A proof using the one-step invariant theorem and induction on n.

formal_statement: theorem symplecticEulerInvariant_preserved (omega dt q p : ℝ) : symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (symplecticEulerQNext omega dt q p) (symplecticEulerPNext omega dt q p) = symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt q p
target: A proof using unfold and ring.

formal_statement: theorem symplecticEulerInvariant_step_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) (hqp : IsSymplecticEulerOrbit omega dt q p) (n : ℕ) : symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q (n + 1)) (p (n + 1)) = symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q n) (p n)
target: A proof destructing the recurrence pair, rewriting, and applying symplecticEulerInvariant_preserved.

formal_statement: theorem symplecticEulerInvariant_const_of_isSymplecticEulerOrbit (omega dt : ℝ) (q p : ℕ → ℝ) (hqp : IsSymplecticEulerOrbit omega dt q p) : ∀ n : ℕ, symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q n) (p n) = symplecticEulerInvariant omega dt (q 0) (p 0)
target: A proof using the adjacent-step invariant theorem and induction on n.

formal_statement: theorem symplecticEulerLinear_det_eq_one (omega dt : ℝ) : det2 (1 - dt ^ 2 * omega ^ 2) dt (-dt * omega ^ 2) 1 = 1
target: A proof using unfold det2 and ring.

formal_statement: theorem explicitEulerStep_zero_dt (y f : Real) : explicitEulerStep 0 y f = y
target: A proof by unfolding explicitEulerStep and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem explicitEulerLinearStep_eq (dt a y : Real) : explicitEulerLinearStep dt a y = (1 + dt * a) * y
target: A proof by unfolding explicitEulerLinearStep and explicitEulerStep, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem midpointRK2Step_zero_dt (a y : Real) : midpointRK2Step 0 a y = y
target: A proof by unfolding midpointRK2Step and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem midpointRK2Step_eq_taylor2 (dt a y : Real) : midpointRK2Step dt a y = linearTaylor2Step dt a y
target: A proof by unfolding midpointRK2Step and linearTaylor2Step, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem heunRK2Step_eq_taylor2 (dt a y : Real) : heunRK2Step dt a y = linearTaylor2Step dt a y
target: A proof by unfolding heunRK2Step and linearTaylor2Step, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem midpointRK2Step_eq_heunRK2Step (dt a y : Real) : midpointRK2Step dt a y = heunRK2Step dt a y
target: A proof by rewriting both sides with midpointRK2Step_eq_taylor2 and heunRK2Step_eq_taylor2.

formal_statement: theorem vec2InfNorm_nonneg (x y : Real) : 0 <= vec2InfNorm x y
target: Unfold vec2InfNorm and use le_max_of_le_left with abs_nonneg.

formal_statement: theorem abs_left_le_vec2InfNorm (x y : Real) : |x| <= vec2InfNorm x y
target: Unfold vec2InfNorm and use le_max_left.

formal_statement: theorem abs_right_le_vec2InfNorm (x y : Real) : |y| <= vec2InfNorm x y
target: Unfold vec2InfNorm and use le_max_right.

formal_statement: theorem row2Apply_const (a b u : Real) (hsum : a + b = 1) : row2Apply a b u u = u
target: Unfold row2Apply, factor a*u+b*u as (a+b)*u, rewrite hsum, and simplify.

formal_statement: theorem row2Apply_abs_le (a b x y M : Real) (ha : 0 <= a) (hb : 0 <= b) (hsum : a + b = 1) (hx : |x| <= M) (hy : |y| <= M) : |row2Apply a b x y| <= M
target: Unfold row2Apply, bound the absolute value by weighted absolute values, use hx/hy, then rewrite a+b=1.

formal_statement: theorem rowStochastic2_const (a b c d u : Real) (hrow1 : a + b = 1) (hrow2 : c + d = 1) : rowStochastic2First a b u u = u /\ rowStochastic2Second c d u u = u
target: Split the conjunction and solve each row with row2Apply_const.

formal_statement: theorem rowStochastic2_infNorm_abs_le (a b c d x y M : Real) (ha : 0 <= a) (hb : 0 <= b) (hc : 0 <= c) (hd : 0 <= d) (hrow1 : a + b = 1) (hrow2 : c + d = 1) (hx : |x| <= M) (hy : |y| <= M) : |rowStochastic2First a b x y| <= M /\ |rowStochastic2Second c d x y| <= M
target: Split the conjunction and solve each row with row2Apply_abs_le.

formal_statement: theorem diag2_zero (a b : Real) : diag2First a 0 = 0 /\ diag2Second b 0 = 0
target: Split the conjunction, unfold each coordinate, and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem diag2_infNorm_le (a b rho x y : Real) (ha : |a| <= rho) (hb : |b| <= rho) (hrho : 0 <= rho) : vec2InfNorm (diag2First a x) (diag2Second b y) <= rho * vec2InfNorm x y
target: Unfold definitions, apply max_le, then use mul_le_mul with the coefficient and coordinate bounds.

formal_statement: theorem finiteRowApply_abs_le {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (a x : ι → Real) (M : Real) (ha : ∀ i, i ∈ s → 0 <= a i) (hsum : ∑ i ∈ s, a i = 1) (hx : ∀ i, i ∈ s → |x i| <= M) : |finiteRowApply s a x| <= M
target: Use Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, Finset.sum_le_sum, Finset.sum_mul, and the row-sum identity.

formal_statement: theorem dft2DC_const (u : Real) : dft2DC u u = 2 * u
target: Unfold dft2DC and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem dft2Nyquist_const (u : Real) : dft2Nyquist u u = 0
target: Unfold dft2Nyquist and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem dft2DC_zero_sum (u0 u1 : Real) (h : u0 + u1 = 0) : dft2DC u0 u1 = 0
target: Unfold dft2DC and exact the assumption h.

formal_statement: theorem idft2First_dft2 (u0 u1 : Real) : idft2First (dft2DC u0 u1) (dft2Nyquist u0 u1) = u0
target: Unfold idft2First, dft2DC, and dft2Nyquist, then use ring.

formal_statement: theorem idft2Second_dft2 (u0 u1 : Real) : idft2Second (dft2DC u0 u1) (dft2Nyquist u0 u1) = u1
target: Unfold idft2Second, dft2DC, and dft2Nyquist, then use ring.

formal_statement: theorem dft2_inverse (u0 u1 : Real) : idft2First (dft2DC u0 u1) (dft2Nyquist u0 u1) = u0 /\ idft2Second (dft2DC u0 u1) (dft2Nyquist u0 u1) = u1
target: Use And.intro with idft2First_dft2 and idft2Second_dft2.

formal_statement: theorem dft2DC_swap (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2DC u1 u0 = dft2DC u0 u1
target: Unfold dft2DC and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem dft2Nyquist_swap (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2Nyquist u1 u0 = -dft2Nyquist u0 u1
target: Unfold dft2Nyquist and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem dft2Energy_eq_two_physical2Energy (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2Energy u0 u1 = 2 * physical2Energy u0 u1
target: Unfold dft2Energy, physical2Energy, dft2DC, and dft2Nyquist, then use ring.

formal_statement: theorem dft2_parseval (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2Energy u0 u1 / 2 = physical2Energy u0 u1
target: Rewrite by dft2Energy_eq_two_physical2Energy and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem finiteDC_centeredSignal_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) (hcard : (s.card : Real) ≠ 0) : finiteDC s (centeredSignal s u) = 0
target: Unfold centeredSignal, finiteMean, and finiteDC; rewrite the sum of differences and the sum of a constant; then use field_simp and ring.

formal_statement: theorem upwindWeights_sum (cfl : ℝ) : (1 - cfl) + cfl = 1
target: A proof using ring.

formal_statement: theorem upwindWeights_nonneg (cfl : ℝ) (hcfl0 : 0 ≤ cfl) (hcfl1 : cfl ≤ 1) : 0 ≤ 1 - cfl ∧ 0 ≤ cfl
target: A proof using constructor and linarith.

formal_statement: theorem upwindStep_const (cfl u : ℝ) : upwindStep cfl u u = u
target: A proof using unfold upwindStep and ring.

formal_statement: theorem upwindStep_monotone (cfl uLeft u vLeft v : ℝ) (hcfl0 : 0 ≤ cfl) (hcfl1 : cfl ≤ 1) (hLeft : uLeft ≤ vLeft) (h : u ≤ v) : upwindStep cfl uLeft u ≤ upwindStep cfl vLeft v
target: A proof using nonnegative weights, mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left, and linarith.

formal_statement: theorem upwindStep_abs_le (cfl uLeft u M : ℝ) (hcfl0 : 0 ≤ cfl) (hcfl1 : cfl ≤ 1) (hLeft : |uLeft| ≤ M) (h : |u| ≤ M) : |upwindStep cfl uLeft u| ≤ M
target: A proof using nonnegativity of the convex weights, abs_add_le, abs_mul, mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left, linarith, and ring.

formal_statement: theorem laxFriedrichsWeights_sum (cfl : ℝ) : laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl = 1
target: A proof using unfold and ring.

formal_statement: theorem laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg (cfl : ℝ) (hcflLower : -1 ≤ cfl) (hcflUpper : cfl ≤ 1) : 0 ≤ laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl ∧ 0 ≤ laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl
target: A proof using unfold, constructor, and linarith.

formal_statement: theorem laxFriedrichsStep_const (cfl u : ℝ) : laxFriedrichsStep cfl u u = u
target: A proof using unfold and ring.

formal_statement: theorem laxFriedrichsStep_monotone (cfl uLeft uRight vLeft vRight : ℝ) (hcflLower : -1 ≤ cfl) (hcflUpper : cfl ≤ 1) (hLeft : uLeft ≤ vLeft) (hRight : uRight ≤ vRight) : laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight ≤ laxFriedrichsStep cfl vLeft vRight
target: A proof using laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg, mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left, and linarith.

formal_statement: theorem laxFriedrichsStep_abs_le (cfl uLeft uRight M : ℝ) (hcflLower : -1 ≤ cfl) (hcflUpper : cfl ≤ 1) (hLeft : |uLeft| ≤ M) (hRight : |uRight| ≤ M) : |laxFriedrichsStep cfl uLeft uRight| ≤ M
target: A proof using weight nonnegativity, abs_add_le, abs_mul, mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left, linarith, and ring.

formal_statement: theorem fluxDifference_const_zero (c : Real) (i : Nat) : fluxDifference (fun _ => c) i = 0
target: A proof by unfolding fluxDifference and closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem conservativeUpdate_zero_scale (u flux : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : conservativeUpdate 0 u flux i = u i
target: A proof by unfolding conservativeUpdate and closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem conservativeUpdate_const_flux (scale c : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : conservativeUpdate scale u (fun _ => c) i = u i
target: A proof by unfolding conservativeUpdate and fluxDifference, then closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem fluxDifference_sum_range (flux : Nat -> Real) : forall n : Nat, Finset.sum (Finset.range n) (fun i => fluxDifference flux i) = flux n - flux 0
target: A proof by induction on n, using Finset.sum_range_succ and ring.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_conservativeUpdate (scale : Real) (u flux : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => conservativeUpdate scale u flux i) n = totalOn u n - scale * (flux n - flux 0)
target: A proof using Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.mul_sum, fluxDifference_sum_range, and rewriting.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_conservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq (scale : Real) (u flux : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : flux n = flux 0) : totalOn (fun i => conservativeUpdate scale u flux i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by rewriting with totalOn_conservativeUpdate and the boundary equality, then closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_conservativeUpdate_of_periodicBoundary (scale : Real) (u flux : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary flux n) : totalOn (fun i => conservativeUpdate scale u flux i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by applying totalOn_conservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq to the periodic-boundary hypothesis.

formal_statement: theorem totalChange_conservativeUpdate (scale : Real) (u flux : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => conservativeUpdate scale u flux i) n - totalOn u n = -scale * (flux n - flux 0)
target: A proof by rewriting with totalOn_conservativeUpdate and closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem secondForwardDifference_const_zero (c : Real) (i : Nat) : secondForwardDifference (fun _ => c) i = 0
target: A proof by unfolding secondForwardDifference and closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem kdvConservativeFlux_const (nonlinear dispersion c : Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion (fun _ => c) i = nonlinear * c ^ 2
target: A proof by unfolding definitions and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem kdvConservativeFlux_const_difference_zero (nonlinear dispersion c : Real) (i : Nat) : fluxDifference (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion (fun _ => c)) i = 0
target: A proof by unfolding definitions and closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem kdvConservativeUpdate_zero_scale (nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeUpdate 0 nonlinear dispersion u i = u i
target: A proof by unfolding kdvConservativeUpdate and applying conservativeUpdate_zero_scale.

formal_statement: theorem kdvConservativeUpdate_const_state (scale nonlinear dispersion c : Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion (fun _ => c) i = c
target: A proof by unfolding kdvConservativeUpdate, conservativeUpdate, fluxDifference, kdvConservativeFlux, and secondForwardDifference, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = totalOn u n - scale * (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n - kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0)
target: A proof by unfolding kdvConservativeUpdate and rewriting with totalOn_conservativeUpdate.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n = kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by unfolding kdvConservativeUpdate and applying totalOn_conservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) n) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by applying totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq.

formal_statement: theorem totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n = kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n - totalOn u n = 0
target: A proof by rewriting with totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate, applying the boundary equality, and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem discreteMass_kdvConservativeUpdate (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : discreteMass (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = discreteMass u n - scale * (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n - kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0)
target: A proof by unfolding discreteMass and applying totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate.

formal_statement: theorem discreteMass_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) n) : discreteMass (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n = discreteMass u n
target: A proof by unfolding discreteMass and applying totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux.

formal_statement: theorem discreteMass_kdvCanonicalUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvCanonicalFlux u) n) : discreteMass (fun i => kdvCanonicalUpdate scale u i) n = discreteMass u n
target: A proof by unfolding kdvCanonicalUpdate and converting the periodic-flux hypothesis with kdvCanonicalFlux.

formal_statement: theorem kdvConservativeUpdate_eq (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i = u i - scale * fluxDifference (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u) i
target: A proof by reflexive unfolding of kdvConservativeUpdate and conservativeUpdate.

formal_statement: theorem discreteMass_eq_totalOn (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : discreteMass u n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by reflexivity.

formal_statement: theorem totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate (scale nonlinear dispersion : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => kdvConservativeUpdate scale nonlinear dispersion u i) n - totalOn u n = -scale * (kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u n - kdvConservativeFlux nonlinear dispersion u 0)
target: A proof by rewriting with totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate and closing with ring.

formal_statement: theorem kdvCanonicalFlux_eq (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : kdvCanonicalFlux u i = 3 * (u i) ^ 2 + secondForwardDifference u i
target: A proof by unfolding kdvCanonicalFlux and kdvConservativeFlux, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem kdvCanonicalFlux_const (c : Real) (i : Nat) : kdvCanonicalFlux (fun _ => c) i = 3 * c ^ 2
target: A proof by reusing kdvConservativeFlux_const at coefficients 3 and 1.

formal_statement: theorem kdvCanonicalFlux_const_difference_zero (c : Real) (i : Nat) : fluxDifference (kdvCanonicalFlux (fun _ => c)) i = 0
target: A proof by unfolding kdvCanonicalFlux and reusing the configurable constant-flux theorem.

formal_statement: theorem kdvCanonicalUpdate_eq (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : kdvCanonicalUpdate scale u i = u i - scale * fluxDifference (kdvCanonicalFlux u) i
target: A proof by unfolding the canonical update and flux definitions.

formal_statement: theorem kdvCanonicalUpdate_zero_scale (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : kdvCanonicalUpdate 0 u i = u i
target: A proof by unfolding kdvCanonicalUpdate and reusing kdvConservativeUpdate_zero_scale.

formal_statement: theorem kdvCanonicalUpdate_const_state (scale c : Real) (i : Nat) : kdvCanonicalUpdate scale (fun _ => c) i = c
target: A proof by reusing kdvConservativeUpdate_const_state at coefficients 3 and 1.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_kdvCanonicalUpdate (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => kdvCanonicalUpdate scale u i) n = totalOn u n - scale * (kdvCanonicalFlux u n - kdvCanonicalFlux u 0)
target: A proof by unfolding canonical definitions and applying totalOn_kdvConservativeUpdate.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_kdvCanonicalUpdate_of_boundary_eq (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : kdvCanonicalFlux u n = kdvCanonicalFlux u 0) : totalOn (fun i => kdvCanonicalUpdate scale u i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by applying the configurable boundary-flux theorem after simplifying kdvCanonicalFlux.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_kdvCanonicalUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (kdvCanonicalFlux u) n) : totalOn (fun i => kdvCanonicalUpdate scale u i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by applying the boundary-equality canonical total theorem.

formal_statement: theorem totalChange_kdvCanonicalUpdate (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => kdvCanonicalUpdate scale u i) n - totalOn u n = -scale * (kdvCanonicalFlux u n - kdvCanonicalFlux u 0)
target: A proof by unfolding canonical definitions and applying totalChange_kdvConservativeUpdate.

formal_statement: theorem heatWeights_sum (r : Real) : heatLeftWeight r + heatCenterWeight r + heatRightWeight r = 1
target: A proof by unfolding the three weight definitions and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatWeights_nonneg (r : Real) (hr0 : 0 <= r) (hrCfl : 2 * r <= 1) : And (0 <= heatLeftWeight r) (And (0 <= heatCenterWeight r) (0 <= heatRightWeight r))
target: A proof by unfolding the weight definitions, splitting conjunctions, and using linarith.

formal_statement: theorem heatStep_const (r u : Real) : heatStep r u u u = u
target: A proof by unfolding heatStep and the weight definitions, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatStep_monotone (r uLeft u uRight vLeft v vRight : Real) (hr0 : 0 <= r) (hrCfl : 2 * r <= 1) (hLeft : uLeft <= vLeft) (h : u <= v) (hRight : uRight <= vRight) : heatStep r uLeft u uRight <= heatStep r vLeft v vRight
target: A proof using heatWeights_nonneg, mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left, and linarith.

formal_statement: theorem heatStep_abs_le (r uLeft u uRight M : Real) (hr0 : 0 <= r) (hrCfl : 2 * r <= 1) (hLeft : |uLeft| <= M) (h : |u| <= M) (hRight : |uRight| <= M) : |heatStep r uLeft u uRight| <= M
target: A proof using heatWeights_nonneg, repeated abs_add_le, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left, linarith, and ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGrid_eq_center_plus_second_difference (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : heatStepGrid r u i = u (i + 1) + r * (u i - 2 * u (i + 1) + u (i + 2))
target: A proof by unfolding heatStepGrid, heatStep, and the weight definitions, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGrid_const (r c : Real) (i : Nat) : heatStepGrid r (fun _ => c) i = c
target: A proof by unfolding heatStepGrid and reusing heatStep_const.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGrid_abs_le (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) (M : Real) (hr0 : 0 <= r) (hrCfl : 2 * r <= 1) (hLeft : |u i| <= M) (h : |u (i + 1)| <= M) (hRight : |u (i + 2)| <= M) : |heatStepGrid r u i| <= M
target: A proof by unfolding heatStepGrid and applying heatStep_abs_le to the three neighboring grid values.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGrid_eq_center_plus_heatSecondDifference (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : heatStepGrid r u i = u (i + 1) + r * heatSecondDifference u i
target: A proof by unfolding heatStepGrid, heatStep, heatSecondDifference, and the weight definitions, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatSecondDifference_sum_range (u : Nat -> Real) : forall n : Nat, Finset.sum (Finset.range n) (fun i => heatSecondDifference u i) = heatBoundaryTerm u n
target: A proof by induction on n, using Finset.sum_range_succ, unfolding definitions, and ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGridTotal_eq (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : heatStepGridTotal r u n = heatInteriorTotal u n + r * heatBoundaryTerm u n
target: A proof using heatStepGrid_eq_center_plus_heatSecondDifference, Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.mul_sum, heatSecondDifference_sum_range, and ring-normalized arithmetic.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGridTotal_change (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : heatStepGridTotal r u n - heatInteriorTotal u n = r * heatBoundaryTerm u n
target: A proof by rewriting heatStepGridTotal_eq and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatBoundaryTerm_eq_zero_of_neumann (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hLeft : u 0 = u 1) (hRight : u (n + 1) = u n) : heatBoundaryTerm u n = 0
target: A proof by unfolding heatBoundaryTerm, rewriting the boundary equalities, and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGridTotal_of_boundary_zero (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hboundary : heatBoundaryTerm u n = 0) : heatStepGridTotal r u n = heatInteriorTotal u n
target: A proof by rewriting heatStepGridTotal_eq, using the zero-boundary hypothesis, and ring.

formal_statement: theorem heatStepGridTotal_of_neumann_boundary (r : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hLeft : u 0 = u 1) (hRight : u (n + 1) = u n) : heatStepGridTotal r u n = heatInteriorTotal u n
target: A proof combining heatBoundaryTerm_eq_zero_of_neumann with heatStepGridTotal_of_boundary_zero.

formal_statement: theorem burgersFlux_eq (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : burgersFlux u i = (u i) ^ 2 / 2
target: A proof by reflexivity after unfolding the definition.

formal_statement: theorem burgersFlux_const (c : Real) (i : Nat) : burgersFlux (fun _ => c) i = c ^ 2 / 2
target: A proof by unfolding burgersFlux and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem burgersFlux_const_difference_zero (c : Real) (i : Nat) : fluxDifference (burgersFlux (fun _ => c)) i = 0
target: A proof by unfolding fluxDifference and burgersFlux, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem burgersConservativeUpdate_eq (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : burgersConservativeUpdate scale u i = u i - scale * (burgersFlux u (i + 1) - burgersFlux u i)
target: A proof by unfolding burgersConservativeUpdate, conservativeUpdate, and fluxDifference.

formal_statement: theorem burgersConservativeUpdate_zero_scale (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : burgersConservativeUpdate 0 u i = u i
target: A proof by unfolding burgersConservativeUpdate and reusing conservativeUpdate_zero_scale.

formal_statement: theorem burgersConservativeUpdate_const_state (scale c : Real) (i : Nat) : burgersConservativeUpdate scale (fun _ => c) i = c
target: A proof by unfolding the update, flux difference, and Burgers flux, then using ring.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_burgersConservativeUpdate (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => burgersConservativeUpdate scale u i) n = totalOn u n - scale * (burgersFlux u n - burgersFlux u 0)
target: A proof by unfolding burgersConservativeUpdate and applying totalOn_conservativeUpdate.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_burgersConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : burgersFlux u n = burgersFlux u 0) : totalOn (fun i => burgersConservativeUpdate scale u i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by unfolding burgersConservativeUpdate and applying totalOn_conservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq.

formal_statement: theorem totalOn_burgersConservativeUpdate_of_periodicFlux (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) (hflux : periodicBoundary (burgersFlux u) n) : totalOn (fun i => burgersConservativeUpdate scale u i) n = totalOn u n
target: A proof by reusing totalOn_burgersConservativeUpdate_of_boundary_eq.

formal_statement: theorem totalChange_burgersConservativeUpdate (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (n : Nat) : totalOn (fun i => burgersConservativeUpdate scale u i) n - totalOn u n = -scale * (burgersFlux u n - burgersFlux u 0)
target: A proof by rewriting totalOn_burgersConservativeUpdate and using ring.

formal_statement: theorem cellAverage2_const (u : Real) : cellAverage2 u u = u
target: Unfold cellAverage2 and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem p0Projection2_preserves_const (u : Real) : p0Projection2Left u u = u /\ p0Projection2Right u u = u
target: Split the conjunction, unfold each projected coordinate, and use cellAverage2_const.

formal_statement: theorem p0Projection2_idempotent (u0 u1 : Real) : cellAverage2 (p0Projection2Left u0 u1) (p0Projection2Right u0 u1) = cellAverage2 u0 u1
target: Unfold p0Projection2Left, p0Projection2Right, and cellAverage2, then use ring.

formal_statement: theorem p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero (u0 u1 : Real) : (u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) + (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) = 0
target: Unfold cellAverage2 and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem p0Projection2_orthogonal_const (u0 u1 c : Real) : (u0 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) * c + (u1 - cellAverage2 u0 u1) * c = 0
target: Rewrite the expression as the residual sum times c, then use p0Projection2_residual_mean_zero.

formal_statement: theorem p0Projection2_pythagorean (u0 u1 : Real) : cellL2Sq2 u0 u1 = cellL2Sq2 (p0Projection2Left u0 u1) (p0Projection2Right u0 u1) + p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1
target: Unfold cellL2Sq2, p0Projection2Left, p0Projection2Right, p0ProjectionResidualSq2, and cellAverage2, then use ring.

formal_statement: theorem p0Projection2_l2_contract (u0 u1 : Real) : cellL2Sq2 (p0Projection2Left u0 u1) (p0Projection2Right u0 u1) <= cellL2Sq2 u0 u1
target: Rewrite by p0Projection2_pythagorean and use sq_nonneg with nlinarith for the residual energy.

formal_statement: theorem p0Projection2_best_const_approx (u0 u1 c : Real) : p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 <= constApproxError2 u0 u1 c
target: Prove the error decomposition by ring, prove the remaining constant error nonnegative by sq_nonneg, and finish with linarith.

formal_statement: theorem weightedCellAverage2_const (m0 m1 u : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u u = u
target: Unfold weightedCellAverage2 and use field_simp with hsum.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_preserves_const (m0 m1 u : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u u = u /\ weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u u = u
target: Split the conjunction, unfold each projected coordinate, and use weightedCellAverage2_const.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_idempotent (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) = weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1
target: Unfold weightedP0Projection2Left, weightedP0Projection2Right, and weightedCellAverage2; use field_simp with hsum.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_residual_weighted_mean_zero (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : m0 * (u0 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) + m1 * (u1 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) = 0
target: Unfold weightedCellAverage2, use field_simp with hsum, and finish with ring.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_orthogonal_const (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : m0 * (u0 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) * c + m1 * (u1 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) * c = 0
target: Rewrite the expression as the weighted residual sum times c, then use weightedP0Projection2_residual_weighted_mean_zero.

formal_statement: theorem weightedCellL2Sq2_nonneg (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) : 0 <= weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1
target: Unfold weightedCellL2Sq2 and use mul_nonneg, sq_nonneg, and nlinarith.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2_nonneg (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) : 0 <= weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1
target: Unfold weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 and use mul_nonneg, sq_nonneg, and nlinarith.

formal_statement: theorem weightedConstApproxError2_nonneg (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) : 0 <= weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 u0 u1 c
target: Unfold weightedConstApproxError2 and use mul_nonneg, sq_nonneg, and nlinarith.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_pythagorean (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1 = weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) + weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1
target: Unfold weightedCellL2Sq2, weightedP0Projection2Left, weightedP0Projection2Right, weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2, and weightedCellAverage2; use field_simp with hsum and ring.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_l2_contract (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 (weightedP0Projection2Left m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedP0Projection2Right m0 m1 u0 u1) <= weightedCellL2Sq2 m0 m1 u0 u1
target: Rewrite by weightedP0Projection2_pythagorean, then use weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2_nonneg and le_add_of_nonneg_right.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_error_decomposition (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 u0 u1 c = weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1 + weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 (weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) (weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) c
target: Unfold weightedConstApproxError2, weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2, and weightedCellAverage2; use field_simp with hsum and ring.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_best_const_approx (m0 m1 u0 u1 c : Real) (hm0 : 0 <= m0) (hm1 : 0 <= m1) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : weightedP0ProjectionResidualSq2 m0 m1 u0 u1 <= weightedConstApproxError2 m0 m1 u0 u1 c
target: Rewrite by weightedP0Projection2_error_decomposition, then use weightedConstApproxError2_nonneg and le_add_of_nonneg_right.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Projection_orthogonal_const {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m u : ι → Real) (c : Real) (hmass : (∑ i ∈ s, m i) ≠ 0) : ∑ i ∈ s, m i * weightedP0Residual s m u i * c = 0
target: Rewrite the sum as the residual mass sum times c, then use weightedP0Residual_mass_zero.

formal_statement: theorem finiteWeightedAbsSum_le {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (a x : ι → Real) (M : Real) (ha : ∀ i, i ∈ s → 0 <= a i) (hsum : ∑ i ∈ s, a i = 1) (hx : ∀ i, i ∈ s → |x i| <= M) : |∑ i ∈ s, a i * x i| <= M
target: Use Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, Finset.sum_le_sum, Finset.sum_mul, and the weight-sum identity.

formal_statement: theorem finiteRowApply_const {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (a : ι → Real) (u : Real) (hsum : ∑ i ∈ s, a i = 1) : finiteRowApply s a (fun _ => u) = u
target: Unfold finiteRowApply, use Finset.sum_mul, rewrite hsum, and ring-normalize.

formal_statement: theorem finiteRowApply_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (a : ι → Real) : finiteRowApply s a (fun _ => 0) = 0
target: Unfold finiteRowApply and use simp.

formal_statement: theorem finiteRowApply_add {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (a x y : ι → Real) : finiteRowApply s a (fun i => x i + y i) = finiteRowApply s a x + finiteRowApply s a y
target: Use Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_congr, and ring.

formal_statement: theorem finiteDC_const {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (c : Real) : finiteDC s (fun _ => c) = (s.card : Real) * c
target: Use Finset.sum_const and nsmul_eq_mul.

formal_statement: theorem finiteDC_add {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u v : ι → Real) : finiteDC s (fun i => u i + v i) = finiteDC s u + finiteDC s v
target: Unfold finiteDC and use Finset.sum_add_distrib.

formal_statement: theorem finiteMean_const {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (c : Real) (hcard : (s.card : Real) ≠ 0) : finiteMean s (fun _ => c) = c
target: Unfold finiteMean, rewrite finiteDC_const, and use field_simp with hcard.

formal_statement: theorem centeredSignal_const_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (c : Real) (i : ι) (hcard : (s.card : Real) ≠ 0) : centeredSignal s (fun _ => c) i = 0
target: Unfold centeredSignal, rewrite finiteMean_const, and use ring.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Residual_mass_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m u : ι → Real) (hmass : (∑ i ∈ s, m i) ≠ 0) : ∑ i ∈ s, m i * weightedP0Residual s m u i = 0
target: Unfold weightedP0Residual and weightedP0Average, distribute the finite sum, use Finset.sum_mul, and field_simp with the nonzero total mass.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Average_const {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m : ι → Real) (c : Real) (hmass : (∑ i ∈ s, m i) ≠ 0) : weightedP0Average s m (fun _ => c) = c
target: Use Finset.sum_mul to factor out the constant and field_simp using nonzero total mass.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Residual_const_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m : ι → Real) (c : Real) (i : ι) (hmass : (∑ j ∈ s, m j) ≠ 0) : weightedP0Residual s m (fun _ => c) i = 0
target: Unfold the residual and use weightedP0Average_const.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Average_add {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m u v : ι → Real) : weightedP0Average s m (fun i => u i + v i) = weightedP0Average s m u + weightedP0Average s m v
target: Use pointwise distributivity, Finset.sum_add_distrib, and ring normalization.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Average_smul {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m u : ι → Real) (c : Real) : weightedP0Average s m (fun i => c * u i) = c * weightedP0Average s m u
target: Commute the scalar through the finite sum with Finset.mul_sum and normalize by ring.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Residual_add {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m u v : ι → Real) (i : ι) : weightedP0Residual s m (fun j => u j + v j) i = weightedP0Residual s m u i + weightedP0Residual s m v i
target: Unfold the residual, use weightedP0Average_add, and close by ring.

formal_statement: theorem weightedP0Residual_smul {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (m u : ι → Real) (c : Real) (i : ι) : weightedP0Residual s m (fun j => c * u j) i = c * weightedP0Residual s m u i
target: Unfold the residual, use weightedP0Average_smul, and close by ring.

formal_statement: theorem finiteDC_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) : finiteDC s (fun _ => 0) = 0
target: Unfold finiteDC and simplify the finite sum of zeros.

formal_statement: theorem finiteDC_neg {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) : finiteDC s (fun i => -u i) = -finiteDC s u
target: Unfold finiteDC and use finite-sum negation.

formal_statement: theorem finiteDC_sub {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u v : ι → Real) : finiteDC s (fun i => u i - v i) = finiteDC s u - finiteDC s v
target: Unfold finiteDC and use Finset.sum_sub_distrib.

formal_statement: theorem finiteDC_smul {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) (c : Real) : finiteDC s (fun i => c * u i) = c * finiteDC s u
target: Unfold finiteDC and use Finset.mul_sum.

formal_statement: theorem finiteMean_add {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u v : ι → Real) : finiteMean s (fun i => u i + v i) = finiteMean s u + finiteMean s v
target: Unfold finiteMean, use finiteDC_add, and normalize division algebra.

formal_statement: theorem finiteMean_smul {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) (c : Real) : finiteMean s (fun i => c * u i) = c * finiteMean s u
target: Unfold finiteMean, use finiteDC_smul, and normalize division algebra.

formal_statement: theorem centeredSignal_add {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u v : ι → Real) (i : ι) : centeredSignal s (fun j => u j + v j) i = centeredSignal s u i + centeredSignal s v i
target: Unfold centeredSignal, use finiteMean_add, and ring-normalize.

formal_statement: theorem centeredSignal_smul {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) (c : Real) (i : ι) : centeredSignal s (fun j => c * u j) i = c * centeredSignal s u i
target: Unfold centeredSignal, use finiteMean_smul, and ring-normalize.

formal_statement: theorem affineInterp_const (theta c : Real) : affineInterp theta c c = c
target: unfold affineInterp; ring

formal_statement: theorem affineInterp_add (theta y0 y1 z0 z1 : Real) : affineInterp theta (y0 + z0) (y1 + z1) = affineInterp theta y0 y1 + affineInterp theta z0 z1
target: unfold affineInterp; ring

formal_statement: theorem affineInterp_smul (theta c y0 y1 : Real) : affineInterp theta (c * y0) (c * y1) = c * affineInterp theta y0 y1
target: unfold affineInterp; ring

formal_statement: theorem affineInterp_abs_le (theta y0 y1 M : Real) (htheta0 : 0 <= theta) (htheta1 : theta <= 1) (hy0 : |y0| <= M) (hy1 : |y1| <= M) : |affineInterp theta y0 y1| <= M
target: Use abs_add_le, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, and mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left.

formal_statement: theorem linearInterp_at_left (x0 x1 y0 y1 : Real) (h : x1 - x0 ≠ 0) : linearInterp x0 x1 y0 y1 x0 = y0
target: unfold linearInterp; field_simp [h]; ring

formal_statement: theorem linearInterp_at_right (x0 x1 y0 y1 : Real) (h : x1 - x0 ≠ 0) : linearInterp x0 x1 y0 y1 x1 = y1
target: unfold linearInterp; field_simp [h]; ring

formal_statement: theorem linearInterp_const (x0 x1 c x : Real) (h : x1 - x0 ≠ 0) : linearInterp x0 x1 c c x = c
target: unfold linearInterp; field_simp [h]; ring

formal_statement: theorem linearInterp_eq_affine (x0 x1 y0 y1 x : Real) (h : x1 - x0 ≠ 0) : linearInterp x0 x1 y0 y1 x = affineInterp ((x - x0) / (x1 - x0)) y0 y1
target: unfold linearInterp affineInterp; field_simp [h]; ring

formal_statement: theorem midpoint1_add (h f g : Real) : midpoint1 h (f + g) = midpoint1 h f + midpoint1 h g
target: unfold midpoint1; ring

formal_statement: theorem midpoint1_smul (h c f : Real) : midpoint1 h (c * f) = c * midpoint1 h f
target: unfold midpoint1; ring

formal_statement: theorem trapezoid2_const (h c : Real) : trapezoid2 h c c = h * c
target: unfold trapezoid2; ring

formal_statement: theorem trapezoid2_add (h f0 f1 g0 g1 : Real) : trapezoid2 h (f0 + g0) (f1 + g1) = trapezoid2 h f0 f1 + trapezoid2 h g0 g1
target: unfold trapezoid2; ring

formal_statement: theorem trapezoid2_smul (h c f0 f1 : Real) : trapezoid2 h (c * f0) (c * f1) = c * trapezoid2 h f0 f1
target: unfold trapezoid2; ring

formal_statement: theorem trapezoid2_nonneg (h f0 f1 : Real) (hh : 0 <= h) (hf0 : 0 <= f0) (hf1 : 0 <= f1) : 0 <= trapezoid2 h f0 f1
target: unfold trapezoid2; nlinarith [mul_nonneg hh (add_nonneg hf0 hf1)]
